recentTweets.text:
When moms and dads lie down to sleep at night and can’t, it’s because they are worried about the cost of living.

I'm proud to see my Build Now Act become law to unlock the American dream of homeownership for families.

Read my latest in @theadvocatebr: https://t.co/oy6CMxDkA5

I’m thankful for all the brave men and women across the Rapides Parish Sheriff’s Office, U.S. Marshals Service, and beyond who brought Deputy U.S. Marshal Hanson’s alleged killer behind bars. 

Now let justice be swift and severe. God bless our law enforcement officers.
Here’s why I have to work harder than an ugly stripper. https://t.co/XX2KVsMjkN

Democrats say Todd Blanche cannot be Attorney General because he represented President Trump. 

The Constitution doesn’t require presidents to appoint their political enemies. Duh. https://t.co/H4PP4jNFHf

Deputy U.S. Marshal Michael Andrew Hanson put his life on the line to protect Louisianians and made the ultimate sacrifice in the line of duty.

Becky and I are praying for his family, friends and fellow law enforcement officers as they grieve this heartbreaking loss. Louisiana

Lindsey was irreplaceable—a small earthquake who could sometimes be utterly and gloriously wrong, but impossible to stay mad at.

He left behind an improved world. I’m going to miss him. https://t.co/H2k7S6TFkG
Here’s a story about my son, Preston. Be nice. https://t.co/oz1FlBfwsx

Heavy rain could bring flash flooding to parts of Louisiana today.

Stay alert, avoid flooded roads and listen to local officials.

https://t.co/EwM81epkaH
Photo by Michael M. Santiago/Getty Images
America weeps. https://t.co/s2EH8wmzmy

I learned two things in high school civics: 

How government works—and to never help your buddy on an exam when your basketball coach has a paddle. https://t.co/b1UkSO3zAG

Louisiana living keeps you humble.

One minute you’re talking about great coffee by the lake—the next, there’s a rat snake on your deck acting like it owns the place. https://t.co/OUMoFSC4Jc

Unless you were playing frisbee on the quad during history or economics class, you know socialism doesn’t work.

The Hamas wing of the Democratic Party embraces it anyway.

Good politics for Republicans. Deeply sad for America. https://t.co/TwLtauIy8z

Louisiana has more alligators than people. 

@TheoVon and I agreed it’s only a matter of time before Democrats try to register them to vote. https://t.co/P2PXynBgv0

Every American with an IQ above a toaster knows Graham Platner’s motherboard is fried. 

Even Sen. Schumer, who can’t cook a cheeseburger for his life, saw this one coming. https://t.co/rneixbolMq

You know why Sen. Schumer runs around like a 5 year old in a Batman costume? 

The far left’s strategy to shut down the government and create chaos ahead of the midterms may have something to do with it. https://t.co/MS6IIvstLd

The Graham Platner wing of the Democratic Party hates George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, Thomas Jefferson, Dr. Seuss, Mr. Potato Head and our free enterprise system. 

But they sure love taking your money and your freedom. https://t.co/y14Q4fFog8

It was great to spend some time with my friend and fellow Louisianian @TheoVon recently. 

He’s the Prime Minister of cool.

https://t.co/WYb2kPhPHV

Happy 250, America!

You are star-spangled awesome—and still the greatest country in all of human history.

Becky and I wish our fellow Louisianians and all Americans a happy Fourth of July! https://t.co/PvATSQsx8N

America is great because of ordinary people doing extraordinary things. 

I’m so darn proud of our country and to call it home. https://t.co/r9tEzKhicE

Thank you @POTUS for having Louisiana’s back. 
 
Tropical Storm Arthur hit our state hard, but Louisianians never quit. This critical disaster aid will help our families, businesses and communities get back on their feet. https://t.co/u2B4u3fIPl

The Save America Act is simple: Go back to Election Day—not election month—and require voters to prove they are who they say they are. 

That’s how we earn back the American people’s trust. https://t.co/9SLafxONVB

I swing both ways... gumbo with rice and gumbo without rice.

Come visit Louisiana. https://t.co/P6nYPwvEq3
Dogs are God’s way of apologizing for the relatives God gave us. I want you to meet Charlie. https://t.co/qwIA8fkKJ9
The SAVE Act restores confidence in our elections by ensuring only American citizens vote in American elections. https://t.co/Uasyfml1Lx
I fought to offer the SAVE Act as an amendment during the last vote-a-rama — and I’ll keep fighting until it passes. https://t.co/bhlgt5PBW5

Let me set the record straight for those who can read.

I have been voicing my strong support for the SAVE Act since it's been introduced.

As I said today, I will stand on one leg and bark like a dog if that’s what it takes to get this bill passed. https://t.co/Uy533L4Qt4

If you think deflation is the solution for inflation, you need to change your meds.

Economic growth is the answer. https://t.co/0NTUUXuzAi

I am saddened by the damage caused by Tropical Storm Arthur but am confident in the strength of Louisianians to recover and rebuild.

If you have damage to your home or property, take photos and upload to https://t.co/fF41WypVnY.

https://t.co/CZ2VUU5zwi

My dad is my hero. I miss him every single day.

Happy #FathersDay to all the hardworking dads across Louisiana and America! https://t.co/flNelbMznx

Two feet of rain in less than 24 hours—a record no one wanted to break.
 
Please continue to pray for families in Avoyelles Parish.

I’m always amazed by Louisianians’ strength in the face of horrific storms.
 
God bless those who came to the rescue during Tropical Storm Aurthur.

If you are one of the thousands of Louisianians who suffered damage from Tropical Storm Arthur, please visit https://t.co/fF41WypVnY to let officials know the extent of the damage in your neighborhood.
 
This information will help officials in Louisiana ensure that we get help to https://t.co/hMayR1rNSB

Tropical Storm Arthur has hit Louisiana hard, and six parishes are now under a state of emergency.
 
Becky and I are praying for the families cleaning up from these floods, tornadoes and storm damage. My office will keep working with state and local officials to ensure Louisiana

Louisianians always have each other’s backs. 
 
I’m so proud of how our state comes together in the face of these horrific storms.

https://t.co/qHNE3j7Apo https://t.co/CLKjfjY8vW

Louisianians: Tropical Storm Arthur still poses a serious risk of flash flooding.
 
Please stay off the roads and pay attention to guidance from local officials as we get through this storm.

My heart goes out to the families in Terrebonne Parish and across Louisiana dealing with tornado damage and flooding from Tropical Storm Arthur.

Louisianians are as tough as a three-dollar steak. We’ll get through this like we always do: by leaning on our friends and neighbors

I’m heartbroken by the images coming out of Avoyelles Parish.

Please join me in praying for these families and the first responders on the scene.

Becky and I are praying for Louisianians experiencing heavy flooding as a result of Tropical Storm Arthur.

As this storm progresses, my office is in close contact with local and state officials. I will continue to monitor conditions on the ground and we will continue to share

Autism is breathtakingly complex, making it difficult for medical professionals to treat — and easy for fraudsters to scam.

We need to ensure every dollar we spend pays for effective therapies, not some crook’s newest Rolex.

Read my latest in @NRO:

https://t.co/Qan0Vkv8XK
The newest addition to my staff. Very sharp. https://t.co/LQabD2Tfjp
This is my backyard. I don't know why you care. https://t.co/JSdvWhXcHB
Come visit Louisiana. You’ll love it. https://t.co/gUnPwiDxKt

I am grateful that the FBI caught the goobers that plotted a major attack on the UFC event at the White House.

I hope they spend some quality time with Bubba in a federal penitentiary. https://t.co/vTBb38vPA8

AOC is the quarterback of today’s Democratic Party, with Bernie Sanders, Zohran Mamdani and Graham Platner helping her run the same old democratic socialist playbook.

My message to them: Your time would be better spent working your way up to management at Panda Express. https://t.co/EslcHdg5nL

I support the SAVE America Act unconditionally.

Reconciliation is still our best shot.

https://t.co/RMdE9o0vwg

Louisiana’s coast is under a tropical storm watch.

Avoid flooded roads and areas. Stay prepared, alert and listen to local officials.

https://t.co/zBe3CRVDdV

Every American with a brain above a single-celled organism knows our federal budget is filled with massive spending porn and stupid stuff.

Congress ought to learn the magical healing power of the word no. https://t.co/WxhRFhmwE3

Becky and I are praying for the families of the eight brave Americans lost in the B-52 crash at Edwards Air Force Base yesterday.

Their tragic loss reminds us that keeping America safe requires courage and selfless sacrifice most of us never see. Our nation grieves with their

For 251 years, the U.S. Army has defended freedom at home and around the world.

Today, we honor the brave men and women whose service and sacrifice keep America strong. https://t.co/tZJZeaqhdL

Old Glory has flown over battlefields, front porches and the graves of our nation's heroes.

Flag Day reminds us what America stands for — freedom, sacrifice and liberty — and deserves our respect today and every day. https://t.co/SECTzwZhgZ
My staff put this one together. I don’t know why you care. https://t.co/NLOguCvwMN
The Graham Platner wing of the Democratic Party has taken the wheel — and they want to burn everything down. https://t.co/x5OeCFQ0uR
The American people deserve to know the truth about Graham Platner. https://t.co/X3tXuRRUgE

When moms and dads go to sleep at night and can’t, they’re worried about the cost of living.

More happy talk won’t fix it. https://t.co/kFjYykSPVT
When I return home this weekend, I’ll make sure Margaret knows she’s famous. https://t.co/6s39oTdd8c

No American should have to sell plasma to afford the insulin they need to live.

I’m working with @SenatorCollins, @SenatorShaheen & @SenatorWarnock on a bipartisan bill to cap insulin prices at $35/month.

It saves taxpayer money and improves lives. Congress must get it done.

The loon wing of the Democratic Party is in control and won’t work with Republicans to pass a sensible budget. 

Sen. Schumer is taking their orders.

It’s completely irresponsible to create this kind of chaos in a dangerous world. https://t.co/ll1W5jIuQe

Minnesota’s Medicaid program is an open bar for fraudsters. 

This crazy behavior cannot happen in America any longer. https://t.co/LQXrymJFU1
All I cared about in high school was basketball and cheerleaders. https://t.co/CrnPrEtOso

assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

82 years ago today, brave American heroes like CPL Edmond Elisar of Ascension Parish, Louisiana stormed the beaches of Normandy to liberate Europe from tyranny. 

He was only 22 years old when he gave his life in service of our country so we could live free. 

God made men like https://t.co/4niQxKt24q

82 years ago, the heroes of D-Day stormed Normandy and showed the world what freedom costs.

They looked tyranny in the eye and did not blink. They helped save the free world.

We can never repay them—but we will always remember their courage, sacrifice and love of country. https://t.co/DTi1his83j
This is my desk when I’m home working in Madisonville. https://t.co/a8xhhDgHqO
Unless you’re industrial-strength stupid, this is plain old common sense. https://t.co/Ifbw88Yim1

Hurricane season is back, and Louisianans are as tough as pine knots—but even tough folks need a plan. 

Stay prepared. Stay alert. Listen to local officials. And don’t wait until a storm is in the Gulf to get ready. https://t.co/Xm0p3hTiF7
Last weekend in Madisonville, I had Becky's not-so-world famous chicken salad sandwhich. https://t.co/97ju2Q7cTh

You have the right to protest peacefully. You don’t have the right to protest violently.

Here is some free advice: Most cops and border patrol agents will leave you alone, unless you do illegal stuff. https://t.co/NocNVnilDe

Illegal immigration is illegal, duh.

The Biden Administration allowed between 12 and 20 million illegal immigrants into our country.

Fair-minded Americans know border security isn't racist. It's prudent. https://t.co/THxxVxUYp5

Jack and Roger were sweet pups.

God is great, dogs are good and people are crazy. https://t.co/dnyNcqlH2c
Margaret has something she wants to share. https://t.co/OF3NWbCQT3

There is no military asset as important as Diego Garcia when it comes to America’s ability to deter China.

It would be weapons-grade stupid to sit by as the U.K. signs it away to a nation in Xi Jinping's pocket.

Read my latest in @NewsweekOpinion:

https://t.co/npDgWlplHh

On Memorial Day, we honor the brave men and women who gave their lives so the rest of us could live free.
 
America is the greatest country in human history because of the heroes who love her more than themselves.
 
Becky and I are praying for their families today. https://t.co/7sUrpaetwx

Government shutdowns cause nothing but pain for the entire country.

That’s why I led the effort to ensure senators share the burden of a shutdown with the American people.

Shared sacrifice isn't crazy. It’s common sense.

Read my latest in @WashTimes:

https://t.co/EoQ9zZYM4P
TicTac, TikTok or whatever it's called is all new to me. https://t.co/RmZl5PqRN4

The Communist government in Cuba is as dead as Jimmy Hoffa. 

All they know how to do is oppress people. 

Communism is like socialism for morons. https://t.co/8TqdTkLYD2

Medicaid in states like California pay for: 

- scooters
- bicycles 
- music lessons 
- exorcisms 

That’s how we end up having $1.2 trillion over a ten-year period stolen from the program. https://t.co/fLqInVwSuA

The loon wing of the Democratic Party is still firmly in control. 

I still don’t expect that to change. 

That’s why our secret plan “Operation: Let Them Speak” should continue. https://t.co/VaZtWvWizZ

California's Medicaid program pays for exorcisms, housing, in-home chefs and student loans.

That's the definition of spending porn. https://t.co/F82CBnIjUQ

It took three times to get my common sense resolution stopping senators’ pay during government shutdowns through the Senate.

It’s a critical first step in ensuring that every senator has some skin in the game when they shut down the country.

It’s called shared sacrifice. https://t.co/QFz2PeH19A

Kamala Harris has never been accused of being a policy maven. 

The loon wing of the Democratic Party may be paying attention to what she says but everyday Americans are just not that impressed. https://t.co/As5NRboNPd

On Armed Forces Day, we honor the brave men and women in uniform who answer the call to serve so the rest of us can live free.

Thank you for your service. https://t.co/y1JT5AYE7f
Hey X, I have someone I’d like you to meet! https://t.co/S8Sg1uvW0H

You don't have to be a senior at Cal Tech to figure out why inflation rose to 9% under President Biden.

He spent billions of dollars and threw money around like it was confetti.

This gutted the middle class like a fish. https://t.co/zlVIolo1Q3

If senators are going to vote to shut down the government and prevent millions of federal workers from getting paid, they ought to have the same skin in the game.

My resolution passed the Senate today to ensure they do.

That's common sense.

https://t.co/TDNJxAiISk

My resolution to stop senators' pay during government shutdowns cleared a key procedural vote today, moving it one step closer to final passage.

Fair-minded Americans know senators should feel the pain of a shutdown with the American people. https://t.co/hI7maEtaIM

If you turned President Xi Jinping upside down and shook him, Mauritius would fall out of his pocket. 

We cannot let the UK hand over our shared military base on Diego Garcia to China’s BFF. https://t.co/PMZYt5WcHJ

Friends in Louisiana: I wanted you to hear about an event my office and our local passport agency are hosting in Lafayette Parish on Thursday, May 21.

I hope it's helpful to any Louisianians who need to apply for or renew their passports ahead of travel plans. https://t.co/n0IGUxxDve

Suicide has become the #2 cause of death for young people. It makes me want to reach for the sick bucket.

I introduced a bill to make sure every student knows they can call the 988 crisis hotline to get help.

Read my latest @TheHill:

https://t.co/BrvV4RLYkp

This National Police week, I’m proud to honor the courage of our heroes in blue. 

Thank you for all the sacrifices you make to keep our families and communities safe! https://t.co/ALizEJ7ucP

Happy Mother’s Day to all the incredible moms in Louisiana and across America!

We appreciate all your hard work and dedication. You make our country great. Thank you! https://t.co/qGs5oE85eG

You have a right to own property in America.

You have a right to own property under Louisiana’s state constitution.

So, if a company wants to build a carbon capture well on your property without your permission in Louisiana, you ought to be able to say NO. https://t.co/KVhiss30tW

President Obama’s always billed himself as a capitalist.

So why does he have such an affinity for “democratic” socialist Mayor Mamdani?
